sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-09-20 07:40
- Distance: 30 km
- Moving time: 3:10:24
- Elapsed time: 3:12:22
- Elevation gain: 277.8 m
- Average heart rate: 168.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 180 bpm
- Average watts: 191.2 W
- Average speed: 9.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `13` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `169.4 bpm`, ranging from `159.3` to `180.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `166.4 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.0 bpm` (+5.6 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `168.9 spm`, with a working range of `140.4` to `176.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `172.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `165.8 spm` (-6.6 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:20 /km` across `30.028 km` in `3:10:24` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:58 /km` and second-half pace was `6:43 /km` (+46 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `168.5 bpm` average and `180 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.4 bpm` in the first half and `170.4 bpm` in the second (+4.0 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `3:10:24` out of `3:12:22` elapsed (99.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `14` stop segments and `2.0%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `334.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `-1.2 m` and `69.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `146.0 m` in the first half and `188.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
